positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric pattern of celestial bodies and constellations, featuring minimalist line art combined with vibrant, flat geometric shapes. The primary elements include interlocking rings, crescent moons, stylized stars, and abstract representations of planetary orbits. Use a color palette of deep midnight blue, glowing gold, iridescent teal, and touches of cosmic lavender. The design should be highly readable, suitable for repeating on fabric, with a strong central focus and clean, crisp lines. Aspect ratio should emphasize visual balance and strong contrast, maximizing impact on apparel. Clean silhouettes, vector aesthetic, flat design, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, writing, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy, low detail, copyright, cartoon, photo, realistic, signature
